channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump uses 'communist' rhetoric as economic worries boost Democrats
item.description: In the last election, Trump struggled to find a memorable attack line against Kamala Harris before settling on 'Comrade Kamala.'

item.title: FCC considers ending subsidy that lowers school internet costs
item.description: Many schools rely on federal consumer fees to reduce internet bills. FCC Chairman Brendan Carr has proposed ending this program.

item.title: Waymo reports teen passengers to police, sparking privacy debate
item.description: Two 15-year-olds were reportedly drinking alcohol and firing toy guns from a driverless taxi before Waymo disabled the vehicle and notified authorities.

item.title: Count Binface: The intergalactic warrior who could disrupt Britain's most unusual election
item.description: Meet Count Binface, an extraterrestrial candidate challenging Nigel Farage as questions about the Reform UK leader's finances loom over his campaign.
